issue_title: Causal loop diagram example doesn't load
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
When opening causal loop diagram example (https://catcolab.org/model/0194cf7f-e59a-7281-a0d9-dce4c68114e4/analysis/019b8f99-b637-7b43-9c6a-6752eaef0c11) 

Page shows the model very briefly and then shows message 

"Error

An unknown error occurred."

In browsers developer consol
test_description_zh: 打开一个因果循环图（Causal Loop Diagram）示例模型的分析页面，观察页面是否能正常加载并持续显示模型内容。
expected_result_zh: 因果循环图示例页面应正常加载，模型内容持续稳定显示，不出现'Error: An unknown error occurred.'的错误提示信息。
